# @agent-os/tenant-material

## Purpose

Adapter from encrypted tenant credential records to execution-time material.

## Public API Status

0.3.x public-experimental. Experimental exports are listed in `PUBLIC_API.md` to prevent accidental exports; they are not frozen.

## Invariant

Resolved credential material exists only at execution-time material resolution.
Public summaries, rejections, ledger payloads, projections, and stream frames
remain symbolic.

## Minimal Usage

Use the package to resolve encrypted credential records at execution time.
Supply decrypt behavior explicitly; there is no plaintext passthrough or
ambient tenant/provider fallback.

## Verification

```sh
cd packages/providers/tenant-material
vp test run
```
